title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election results 2026 at a glance: vote share, seats, constituency-wise map, and more
description: Newcomer Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) led by actor-turned-politician C. Joseph Vijay swept the State, bringing down Dravidian majors DMK and AIADMK in a historic shift. Here are graphics giving the overview of results.
